legacy.analysis:
The run failed before any validation metric was produced. The immediate issue is `balanced_accuracy_score(..., labels=class_order)`: scikit-learn does not accept a `labels` argument there, so the fold loop crashes on the first validation score computation. Remove that argument and rerun; the rest of the pipeline may still need verification after that fix.

Submission validation failed: stale working/submission.csv from before this node execution
